zh.Lys-lez Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, F: 法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys於1211年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易時，他的父親Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys30歲，母親Jehanne de Landrecies13歲。他和Marota de Balleuil至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1279年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.Lys-lez Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, F: 法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys于1211年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易时，他的父亲Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys30岁，母亲Jehanne de Landrecies13岁。他和Marota de Balleuil至少有2个儿子。他去世于大约1279年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: altered form of Flemish Van Oye or Van Hoye (or perhaps an Americanized form of any of their French variants, such as Vanoye, Vannoye, and Vanhoye), a habitational name for someone from a place called with Middle Dutch oye ‘(water) meadow’, as for example Hoye, near Ghent, Belgium. This form of the surname has apparently died out in France. Compare Van Hoy and Vanoy .

History: According to the family tradition, the ancestors of Vannoy family were Huguenots from France who first settled in the Netherlands and later moved to North America. However, their surname is not listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, nor in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vanoy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ancil, Cecile.
American or French: variant of   Vannoy  , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Van Hoy
meanings: American or French (also Vanhoy): variant of Vannoy , a surname of Flemish origin. This surname is very rare in France (Nord).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Benoit, Monique, Patrice, Yanick.
Flemish and Dutch: patronymic from a shortened form of the personal name Laurei(n)s (see Lawrence ).
Scottish: habitational name from one of a number of places in Aberdeenshire, Angus and Perthshire, named with Old English lǣse ‘pasture, meadow’ (see Lees ).

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Lorens, Laurence, from Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’, a place in Italy probably named from its laurels or bay trees. The name was borne by a Christian saint who was martyred at Rome in the 3rd century AD ; he enjoyed a considerable cult throughout Europe, with consequent popularity of the personal name (French Laurent, Italian, Spanish Lorenzo, Catalan Llorenç, Portuguese Lourenço, German Laurenz, Polish Wawrzyniec, etc.). In Britain this is a common name from the 12th century, with pet forms such as Law , Low , Lawrie , Laurie , Larry , Larkin , all of which are represented in surnames. There was also a feminine form Laurencia which may have given rise to the English surname. The surname is also borne by Jews among whom it is presumably an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Ashkenazic surnames. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. German Lorenz , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Slovenian Lavrenčič and Lovrenčič (patronymics from Lavrencij and Lovrenc, equivalents of Lawrence), Polish Wawrzyniak . Compare Larrance , Laurence , Lawerence , Lieurance , and Lowrance .

nameMeanings.name: Gilles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Aegidus, Old French Gide. See Giles .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Loving’.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Greek: Same as Catherine.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys was born in 1211, in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys, was 30 and his mother, Jehanne de Landrecies, was 13. He had at least 2 sons with Marota de Balleuil. He died about 1279, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys est né en 1211, à Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jehanne de Landrecies, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Marota de Balleuil. Il est décédé environ 1279, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys 1211 in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys 30 und seine Mutter Jehanne de Landrecies 13. Er hatte mit Marota de Balleuil mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1279 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys è nato il nel 1211 nel Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Jehanne de Landrecies, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Marota de Balleuil. Morì circa 1279, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lysが1211年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードリス-レズ-ラノイで生まれた時，父Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lysは30歳，母Jehanne de Landreciesは13歳であった。彼はMarota de Balleuilとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1279年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys(이)가 1211년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 리스-레즈-랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jehanne de Landrecies(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Marota de Balleuil(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1279년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys nasceu em 1211, em Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jehanne de Landrecies, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Marota de Balleuil. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1279, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys родился в 1211 г. в местности лис-лез-ланнои, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jehanne de Landrecies, 13. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Marota de Balleuil. Он умер около 1279 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilles II dit Egidius de Lannoy de la Lys nació en 1211, en Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gilles Ier dit Gillion de Lannoy de la Lys, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jehanne de Landrecies, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Marota de Balleuil. Murió aproximadamente 1279, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
